commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_no_recov into OBDF_NO_RECOV
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_no_recov into OBDF_NO_RECOV

Change the use of the obd_no_recov bitfield into a bit in
the obd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Add obd_no_recov to spelling.txt to catch old patches.
